<context>
Cognitive mode: constructive-architect
Type: flexible
</context>

<objective>
Install, authenticate, and verify Capillary MCP servers across supported agent platforms (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI). Maintains an internal registry of known Capillary MCPs so new servers can be added by extending one section of SKILL.md.

Phases:

- inventory: Enumerate registry of known Capillary MCPs; detect installed agent platforms and existing MCP configurations
- select: Choose which MCP(s) to install and on which platform(s); honor explicit args when provided
- install: Run platform-appropriate add commands or edit platform config files to register the chosen MCP(s)
- authenticate: Guide the user through OAuth or token auth for each newly installed MCP; detect completion
- verify: Confirm connection via platform mcp list and exercise one live tool call per installed MCP
  </objective>
